programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom(n)

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The bank holiday works schedule is disrupted when reports come in of a trespasser on the relief lines outside London, forcing the cancellation of all trains leaving Paddington station. However, the total shutdown allows the engineers onto the track to renew large sections of the ageing rail infrastructure. Meanwhile, transport police hunt for a bike thief at Bristol's Temple Meads station(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as the hospital siege escalates. After Robbo's interview with Ouroboros leader Des yields nothing, he suspects there is a mole inside the Feds(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Toadie decides not to do anything special to mark the anniversary of Sonya's death, but his family disagree. Harlow reluctantly attends Gary's welcome back barbecue for Prue(n)

programme.title: A Wedding to Die For (2019)
programme.desc: An engaged woman plans to marry her volatile fiance, but then escape his clutches during the honeymoon. Thriller, starring Christa B Allen and Danielle C Ryan(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross discovers a strange growth on his buttocks, Phoebe finds it hard to choose between two prospective lovers, and Monica's boyfriend surprises her. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Lisa Kudrow(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica's rich boyfriend embarks on a bid to become the Ultimate Fighting Champion. Chandler feels his boss is becoming a little too friendly, and the gang is delighted to overhear a scandalous conversation between two familiar-looking men in Central Perk. Comedy, guest starring Robin Williams and Billy Crystal(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Toadie decides not to do anything special to mark the anniversary of Sonya's death, but his family disagree. Harlow reluctantly attends Gary's welcome back barbecue for Prue(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as the hospital siege escalates. After Robbo's interview with Ouroboros leader Des yields nothing, he suspects there is a mole inside the Feds(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories(n)

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers with Alan Davies
programme.desc: The comedian returns, and assists vet Gwen as she takes on the case of Staffordshire bull terrier Annie, who has a suspected broken leg and a mystery lump. In Carlisle, Inspector Sam tries to save the life of a severely beaten dog called Bruce(n)

programme.title: Britain's Naughtiest Nursery
programme.desc: Day-to-day life at a nursery for challenging three-to-five year olds, set up by psychologist Laverne Antrobus. Frankie's hyperactive behaviour has left his mum exhausted, Daisy has driven her parents to despair with her stroppy outbursts and Tegan's tantrums are enough to take anyone's breath away. Can Laverne settle these youngsters down?(n)

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: After years looking after her family, mum of two Julie has decided it is time to focus on herself. She wants to fling out the frumpy wardrobe and inject some glamour into her ageing appearance. Her first stop is a trip to a cosmetic physician to find out if her sagging skin can be lifted without resorting to surgery. Ex-police officer Amanda wants to go back to the fun-loving party girl she once was so she agrees to try the latest catwalk trends, gets a make-up lesson and faces her fear of the dentist to tackle her damaged teeth(n)

programme.title: Me and My
programme.desc: Candid documentary strand in which individuals speak straight to the camera, here talking about the psychological challenges of having facial structures different from the norm. They include model-turned-presenter Gail Porter, once admired for her looks, who lost her hair through alopecia. Others are Jono, who was born without cheekbones, Matipa, one of four black sisters but the only one with albinism. Alex, who lost his lips and the flesh around his mouth after suffering a virus and Naomi, whose face was scarred by an acid attack(n)

programme.title: Billionaire Kids: Diamond Lives
programme.desc: Documentary about the luxurious lives of children from wealthy families, including the teenage son of a Formula One entrepreneur who has access to personal chauffeurs and fitness trainers. The programme also looks at the companies able to make a profit by catering to the youngsters' every whim, from party planners to the manufacturers of miniature supercars(n)

programme.title: The Naked Truth (1957)
programme.desc: Celebrities threatened with blackmail decide they would rather murder the extortionist than pay him, but things do not go according to plan. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Peter Sellers, Dennis Price, Peggy Mount, Shirley Eaton and Joan Sims(n)

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish(n)

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger(n)

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: A chain of bizarre and deadly incidents in several countries leads scientists to the conclusion that the Earth's core has stopped spinning. As chaos erupts around the world, experts hatch a plan to halt the destruction and save the human race - but it involves venturing deep below the planet's surface to detonate a nuclear bomb. Sci-fi thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank, Stanley Tucci and DJ Qualls(n)

programme.title: Gifted (2017)
programme.desc: Single man Frank Adler attempts to raise his child prodigy niece, Mary. However, his plans for a normal school life for the youngster are foiled when the youngster's mathematical abilities come to the attention of Frank's formidable mother, Evelyn. Drama, starring Chris Evans, Lindsay Duncan and Mckenna Grace(n)

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian (2011)
programme.desc: An evil warlord kills a barbarian chieftain, whose son grows up to be a mighty warrior and seeks revenge for his father's death. He finds there is more at stake, as the tyrant is close to acquiring all the pieces of a magic mask, which will make him all-powerful. Fantasy adventure, with Jason Momoa, Stephen Lang, Ron Perlman and Rose McGowan(n)

programme.title: A Dark Song (2016)
programme.desc: A grieving woman hires an occultist who claims he can put her in contact with her dead son. They shut themselves in a rural mansion for the months-long and ancient Abramelin Procedure, which includes days without sleep, fasting, backbreaking rites and ritual sex - and cannot be abandoned safely before its completion. Psychological horror, starring Catherine Walker and Steve Oram(n)

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla(n)

programme.title: The Gentle Sex (1943)
programme.desc: Seven women from vastly different backgrounds are brought together as volunteers in the Auxiliary Territorial Service during the Second World War. Despite their differences they become firm friends during training and on assignment driving military transport and operating anti-aircraft guns. Drama, starring Rosamund John, Joan Greenwood, Lilli Palmer, John Justin and Joan Gates(n)

programme.title: The Tin Star (1957)
programme.desc: A world-weary bounty hunter, formerly a sheriff, arrives in a small town where a newly-appointed lawman is struggling to keep the peace. When he learns of the mercenary's past, the inexperienced lawman seeks his help in learning the tricks of the trade so he can bring an outlaw gang to justice. Anthony Mann's Western, starring Henry Fonda, Anthony Perkins, Lee Van Cleef, Betsy Palmer and Michel Ray(n)

programme.title: Kidnapped (1971)
programme.desc: A naive young man is cheated out of his inheritance by his conniving uncle, who sells him to the captain of a slave ship. On board he forms an alliance with a hardened rebel, and the pair make their escape when the ship is wrecked on the Scottish coast. Period adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel set during the Jacobite Uprising, with Michael Caine, Lawrence Douglas, Trevor Howard, Jack Hawkins and Donald Pleasence(n)

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa(n)

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace(n)

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: After Mitch Rapp's girlfriend Katrina accepts his wedding proposal during an idyllic European beach holiday, they and many others are gunned down by terrorists. Mitch survives and becomes a master of unarmed combat before the US government consider using him for black ops. Action thriller, starring Dylan O'Brien, Michael Keaton and Sanaa Lathan(n)

programme.title: Buffalo Soldiers (2001)
programme.desc: American soldier Ray Elwood leads a comfortable life in Cold War Germany, selling everything from cleaning products to heroin on the black market, with his weak-willed commanding officer blissfully unaware. However, everything changes when a tough new sergeant arrives determined to clean up the base, while a profitable arms deal and the new arrival's teenage daughter only complicate matters further. Black comedy drama, with Joaquin Phoenix, Ed Harris, Anna Paquin and Scott Glenn(n)

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave(n)

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum(n)

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher(n)

programme.title: My Friend Dahmer (2017)
programme.desc: The early years of Ohio serial killer Jeffrey Dahmer are charted in this drama inspired by his friend Derf Backderf's graphic novel, starring Ross Lynch, Anne Heche and Alex Wolff(n)

programme.title: Die Hard 2 (1990)
programme.desc: Tough cop John McClane arrives at an airport to pick up his wife, but finds himself plunged into a bloody life-or-death struggle. He must battle terrorists who have seized control of the terminal as part of a campaign to secure the release of a convicted drug baron. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Bonnie Bedelia, William Sadler, Franco Nero and William Atherton(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Mike & Molly

programme.desc: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry in a game of basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the school gym. Beverly tries to throw a 'surprise' party for Murray's 50th birthday, despite his objections to the idea(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.desc: Leonard and Penny continue testing their rekindled relationship using an innovative system to report discrepancies. programme.title: Baby Daddy

Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Sean Giambrone and Hayley Orrantia(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray is honoured as one of the area's top businessmen, Beverly's attempt to help her husband find a hobby backfires, and Erica comes to the rescue when Barry's scheme to steal golf carts goes awry(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Sheldon panics when Leonard announces he has to go into hospital for surgery, and the impending divorce of Raj's parents motivates Howard and Bernadette to work on their own marriage. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephew's birthday party(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys' social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Penny's ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star(n)

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. programme.title: The British Middle Class
programme.desc: Historian and broadcaster Tristram Hunt examines the social class's origins. He discovers how the backlash against the landed aristocracy began with a group of radical thinkers who craved progress and used their money from industry to begin a process of urban enlightenment. However, the growth of mass production led the newly moneyed leaders to move further away from the factories, beginning the trend for suburban living as a mark of status - though it meant the middle classes turning their back on where they came from(n)

programme.desc: Historian and broadcaster Tristram Hunt examines the social class's origins. He discovers how the backlash against the landed aristocracy began with a group of radical thinkers who craved progress and used their money from industry to begin a process of urban enlightenment. However, the growth of mass production led the newly moneyed leaders to move further away from the factories, beginning the trend for suburban living as a mark of status - though it meant the middle classes turning their back on where they came from(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough highlights the curiosities that have led to accusations of forgery, but have ultimately helped assist the rethinking of evolution. When early explorers brought the first specimen of a duck-billed platypus to England in 1799, it was considered so bizarre it was deemed a hoax. Similarly, the midwife toad became the centre of a scientific storm in the 1920s that led to accusations of fakery(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on a 45-mile hike through the countryside of the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the area's rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps him relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. From there, he travels up what used to be secret paths to Hever Castle and finds out how the monarch's reign brought not only huge social, political and industrial change, but also fame and disaster to the women who caught his eye He ends this leg of his journey in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions(n)

programme.desc: Tony Robinson goes on a four-day trek through the Kintail region of the north-western Highlands, examining the story of the Jacobite uprisings of the early 1700s along the way. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras follow adolescent babirusa Tolo, who lives with his devoted mother Sula. They are very close, enjoying mud baths and pedicures together. But Sula has a hoof problem so they must be separated for the vet to intervene, and keepers are concerned for Tolo's wellbeing in her absence. Meanwhile, laid-back rock hyraxes Daissie and her partner Nungu are expecting their eighth litter. With the birth imminent, the couple's life of ease could be a thing of the past(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including EastEnders. This Morning, Ant and Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway, The Sex Clinic, Hunted, the news featuring Harvey Weinstein and Netflix hit The Stranger(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Cruises: Going Overboard
programme.desc: Documentary examining cases where passengers aboard cruise ships fell overboard. The programme examines the chances of survival for someone adrift at sea, and if enough is being done to prevent further tragedies and investigate the reasons for the incidents when they occur(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant and boxing ring girl Chloe sits down with 'geezer' Anthony, who believes his cheeky wink can charm any woman. Actor Josh seeks a leading lady, but as a dwarf he has struggled to find someone who won't judge him on his height. His date is housing support officer Lori, who at four foot 11 has also found love a challenge. Also, dedicated father Rob is paired with former Butlin's Redcoat Donna. How will she react when he reveals he has 10 children?(n)

programme.title: The Windsors
programme.desc: Charles and Camilla reluctantly agree to attend Kate's father's birthday celebrations, where long-standing family rivalries flare up over who has bought him the best present. Fergie takes Beatrice and Eugenie to Glastonbury, but only two of them can get into the VIP area, leaving one member of the family outing forced to mingle with the general public. Meghan catches Harry in a compromising situation with Pippa, and Charles suspects an attempted regicide is on the cards and plans to strike first. Simon Day (The Fast Show) and Julia Deakin (Spaced) guest star as Kate's parents(n)

programme.title: The Windsors: Secrets of the Royal Tours
programme.desc: Official tours and state visits in the past 30 years, including Diana, Princess of Wales' charity work and visit to Angola for landmine awareness in 1997, and the first official overseas tour by the new Duke and Duchess of Cambridge, to Canada in 2011(n)

programme.title: D-Day: The King Who Fooled Hitler
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the role played by George VI in maintaining the secrecy of the plans for the D-Day Landings, and how the royal family regained the trust of British intelligence, following concerns about Edward VIII's reputation as a Nazi sympathiser. The programme also examines how the Queen Mother preserved one of the greatest secrets of the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Helen Lawal searches for the secret to perfectly shelled walnuts in California, while Matt Tebbutt hopes to discover what makes sweets sour. Andi Oliver investigates how the cloud gets into the hazy beers that are so trendy currently(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with a bar owner in Spain whose business fell apart, two fishing lake owners in France struggling to stay afloat, and a restaurant in Mallorca that opened too late(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the Crescent Victoria hotel in Margate, Kent, where hosts Farid Al-Faisal and John Dennis aim to treat their guests like royalty. Unfortunately, only one of the pairs feel like princesses, with the rest being less than impressed by the attempt at luxury(n)

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: James Constantinou is armed and dangerous in an army tank that a military vehicle enthusiast hopes to sell for £30,000 to fund the family trip of a lifetime, and brushes up on his history when he's presented with a Sultan's sword. Designer handbag expert Claudia Valentin meets a man-about-town who wants to upgrade his Hermes Birkin bag(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team are in Hay on Wye and Bedford, where Henry restores a bespoke workbench, and Simon ponders the possibilities of some discarded planks of wood(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur chefs host dinner parties in Leicester in a bid to win the £1,000 prize. Aromatherapist Erica Swithenbank, yoga teacher Anne Marie Newland, graphic designer Jamie Traynor and security officer Pretesh Singadia compete against one another in evenings featuring compulsory meditation and body painting(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four contestants from in and around Liverpool compete to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 prize. First up is shop owner Sally who hopes to impress with her vintage-themed Italian night, while mortgage advisor Gareth aims to provoke a debate with his choice of unusual meats. The third evening features a seafood-inspired menu, while final host Cindy offers the diners some home comforts(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada
programme.desc: Greg Roberts, CEO of Mary Brown's Famous Chicken and Taters - one of Canada's biggest home-grown chains of fast food restaurants - goes undercover among the workers in one of the eateries. As the company has begun to develop internationally in the past three years, Greg wants to discover the improvements that could be made before further expansion occurs(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant which often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon Ramsay instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's snooty parents announce they are going to pay a visit - much to the dismay of Ray, who pleads with Frank and Marie to be on their best behaviour and avoid embarrassing him. Ray Romano stars(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray ignores Frank's advice and loses all his cash in a poker game. Debra urges him to ask for the money back, but he is too proud to beg his father for help. Comedy, starring Ray Romano(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Joe spends the night in Daphne's room, causing a shocked Frasier's mind to work overtime and Niles to become consumed by jealousy. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes dancing lessons in preparation for a posh society ball, but his date falls ill at the last minute, so he asks Daphne to go with him instead. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Allan have been together for 10 years and with three grown up children between them, are hoping to buy their first home together - somewhere they can go to relax and unwind in Manilva, Spain. With a maximum budget of £135,000 at her disposal, property expert Danni Menzies sets out to find the perfect property for the duo and their dog, Sirloin(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with owners of a boat charter company in Spain who struggled in their first season. Elsewhere in France, a bar owner gets in trouble with the local police(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In this revisit episode, chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Mojito, the Junction (formerly known as Flamangos) and Bazzini to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress?(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Cruises: Going Overboard
programme.desc: Documentary examining cases where passengers aboard cruise ships fell overboard. The programme examines the chances of survival for someone adrift at sea, and if enough is being done to prevent further tragedies and investigate the reasons for the incidents when they occur(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager is rushed to hospital with a lacerated wrist after putting his hand through a pane of glass, an incident which leaves his father reflecting on his family history. Another patient discusses being diagnosed with a chronic condition that causes constant stomach pain, and a 76-year-old woman suffers severe shortness of breath and a tight chest(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives(n)

programme.title: 100 Kilo Kids: Obesity SOS
programme.desc: Following young patients in the Bristol Royal Hospital for Children, Britain's leading childhood obesity clinic, a last resort for children living with extreme obesity. 14-year-old Tommy is one of the clinic's heaviest patients, and despite 18 months of treatment, his weight is spiraling out of control. Elsewhere, five-year-old Liliana's extreme appetite is a cause for concern(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Christine Attwood and Tony Congdon in Purley, Croydon, who need help deciding whether they should sell or upgrade their home. The pair have been going back and forth for almost a decade about the future of their unusual bungalow - Tony loves the property and its location, but Christine longs to move closer to the coast to enjoy her retirement(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A two-year-old Bengal cat is rushed in after being hit by a car, and when it turns out to have a broken back and a dislocated spine, Noel Fitzpatrick agrees to do what he can - but he makes no promises. A German shepherd requires a total elbow replacement, a difficult operation using a custom printed implant system, and a Rottweiler puppy is treated for a genetic condition that has destroyed the cartilage on its ankle bone(n)

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Documentary set inside Wood Green animal charity. A two-year-old Pomeranian called Bear arrives at the centre, rescued from a life spent caged on a puppy farm. Can Bear learn to trust again and win the hearts of a family looking for a dog? Meanwhile, Knobby the Chihuahua puppy tries to charm his way into the affections and home of couple Alex and Kier(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with owners of a boat charter company in Spain who struggled in their first season. Elsewhere in France, a bar owner gets in trouble with the local police(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. The White Swan is first and Roman and Tamsyn have some cracks to paper over from previous critiques in the week(n)

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: High-end pawnbroker James heads to Marbella to appraise a 75ft yacht worth £250,000. However, he finds the vessel rather tricky to locate. An aspiring restaurateur seeks to raise £80,000 by selling his Ferrari Spyder and a large diamond ring that was handed down through the generations gets James hot under the collar(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien restores an enamel roll-top bath and builds a den out of old doors. Henry Cole makes a wall mounted safe from a jerry can and lovingly restores a cheese-making trough(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four people from Newcastle compete for the £1,000 prize during a week of dining, which includes a starter called the 'knicker-dropper', a tearful disaster and a surprise confession on the final night. The contestants vying to win are finance manager Liz O'Sullivan, eyelash-extension technician Julie Scullion, trainee teacher Ritu Nayyer and smooth-talking Mark Shields(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four contestants compete in south-east London to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 prize. First to host is publicist Gemma, who is keen to impress with her cheese-themed menu. Next up, Michael provides a traditional English menu, before Adam - a former Home and Away actor - offers an Australian night. On the final evening, food connoisseur Audrey takes a risk by serving up Japanese cuisine(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada
programme.desc: Katharine Schmidt, executive director of non-profit organisation Food Banks Canada, dons a disguise to help out in one of the company's soup kitchens. Almost one million citizens, 40 per cent of them children, rely on the company's services each month(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In a bid to outdo Marie's culinary skills, Debra goes against tradition by serving a fish dish on Thanksgiving. Not to be upstaged, her meddling mother-in-law turns up with a turkey. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ousted as captain of Nemo's basketball team, so Ray replaces him and begins devoting all his time to coaching - leading Debra to accuse him of neglecting the children(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Diane visits Seattle for the opening night of her new play, which turns out to be a mixed blessing for Frasier. Although hurt over being jilted, he still harbours feelings for her - but they disappear once he attends the dress rehearsal. Shelley Long guest stars(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A shady character helps the Crane brothers get Maris out of a spot of legal trouble - then demands they return the favour by persuading his girlfriend to marry him. Comedy, guest starring Harris Yulin, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary and Carol from Kent seek a home in Aquitaine, France, so house-hunting expert Laura Hamilton tries to find them the perfect property(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with an Anglo-French couple who lived in a barn to maximise their earnings and a fruit juice entrepreneur trying to expand into new markets on the French Riviera(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes(n)

programme.title: Prison
programme.desc: The concluding edition explores the emotionally charged difficulties of being a mother in prison. Staff at HMP Foston Hall, where more than 300 women are incarcerated for everything from murder to non-payment of fines, believe that maintaining family contact is vital to reduce reoffending. Kelly challenges the family court to renew contact with her young boys, while Lexi is trying to figure out how to tell her young son why she is in jail as now he is getting older he has started to ask her questions about it(n)

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: One of the fugitives is captured by the hunters, who subject her to devious psychological pressures to reveal her partner's whereabouts. Hayley misses her dog and risks returning to Wigan to intercept the pup - unaware her every move is being tracked. Will her pet reunion come at a high price?(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: 3rd Rock from the Sun
programme.desc: Harry loses his beloved coat and Sally builds a shelf to hold all her shoes, while Dick tries to acquire a sense of humour - but ends up publicly humiliating Mary. Meanwhile, Harry loses his coat and Sally builds a shelf to hold her shoes. American sci-fi comedy, starring John Lithgow, Joseph Gordon-Levitt Jane Curtin(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The acerbic doctor tries to whittle down the seven remaining candidates for his medical team by assigning them the case of a woman who claims she can see the dead. Meanwhile, Cuddy offers Foreman a position back at the hospital, but he is reluctant to accept once it is revealed he will have to work side by side with House. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The maverick physician is forced to confront his own limitations when presented with a mugging victim who mimics the personalities of those around him, making it almost impossible for him to differentiate between the patient's genuine and false symptoms. Meanwhile, Foreman returns to the hospital to supervise the remaining applicants. Frank Whaley guest stars, with Hugh Laurie and Omar Epps(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Claire and Simon seek eviction specialist Chris's help to evict a man claiming to be renting their old family home. Meanwhile, Hamza hopes to get his council flat back after he tried to help a neighbour's friend by letting them stay for a week, but ended up being shut out when they refused to leave. Plus, a man is almost £30,000 in debt and in danger of repossession after his tenants stopped paying the rent(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Bath resident Mark and his new neighbour Fran bonded over their shared love of dogs, but things soon turned sour when he claims he turned down her amorous advances - driving her to unleash a campaign of harassment. Plus, an East Sussex farmer who ended up in a border dispute with the couple who lived nearby, and a Southampton forced to challenge her neighbour over his loud partying - a disagreement that led to violence(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian O'Shaughnessy and Graham Aldred's first case sees them in a Brighton health spa as they search for assets to seize in pursuit of a £20,000 debt. Following a stand-off, they devise a way to work with the owner and her professional advisers to come up with a solution. Later, Graham reveals his softer side when he revisits a woman who defaulted on a debt payment plan(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In north London, agents Del and Dael chase nearly £2,000 owed by a printing company, but the owner denies the debt and starts getting physical. Meanwhile, Stewart and Elmor find themselves caught up in a personal dispute when they try to collect rent arrears from a barber's shop, and in Bedfordshire, Del and Brian try to recover almost £2,000 owed to a funeral director. Stewart and Vic track down a debt of £5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in West London(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Finn is annoyed when Bea refuses his request to stop singing at the Waterhole, while Aaron tries to get Mark Brennan and Paige together(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ryder is charged with uploading the sex tape, giving Mac no choice but to reinstate Jade. Colby hears Bella being nasty to Mackenzie(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctor resorts to desperate measures to persuade soap star Evan Greer to have tests for a brain tumour, but events spiral out of control when the actor slips into a coma. Without time for debate, House prescribes a massive dose of steroids, but his rash decision could lead to tragedy. Wilson and Amber explore their relationship, and Cameron is given a tedious duty, which brings her back into contact with House. Guest starring Sex and the City's Jason Lewis(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Part one of two. The doctor suffers short-term memory loss in a bus crash and is plagued by the belief that one of the passengers needs his help. Limp Bizkit's Fred Durst guest stars(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole

programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic is flown to a top-secret location to treat a CIA employee, but resorts to unconventional methods when he is forced to make a diagnosis without any clues as to the man's medical history. programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic takes on the case of a facially disfigured teenager who suffers a heart attack shortly before undergoing plastic surgery, but is vexed to discover that his every move will be followed by a documentary film crew paying for the boy's treatment. Meanwhile, attractive new recruit Dr Samira Terzi begins to cloud House's judgment. Michael Michele (ER) guest stars, with Hugh Laurie and Omar Epps(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A woman living in Slough becomes embroiled in a dispute with a neighbour, certain that he is behind recent damage to her car and stones thrown at her window. Meanwhile, Hereford couple Manny and Sianna are forced to call the police after complaining about their neighbours Gail and Gordon's four dogs. But things go from bad to worse as Gordon and Manny end up fighting in the garden(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The story of a couple Simon and Emma, who moved to a peaceful town in the east of Scotland, where they received a less than cheery welcome from their neighbours, and soon suspected the animosity they faced had something to do with their 11 children and two huskies. Plus, a feud that erupted after a fuchsia bush threatened to scratch one homeowner's beloved classic car in Portsmouth, and a tit-for-tat dispute over a boundary fence in a Manchester suburb, leading to the erection of an ugly concrete barrier(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor attempt to collect £5,000 owed by a debtor in north Wales, but the situation spirals out of control when a group of friends try to take on the agents. Meanwhile, Del and Dael head to south-east London to chase nearly £7,000 owed by a man to his ex-girlfriend, before visiting a woman who owes her solicitor almost £4,000 after a compensation claim went wrong. In Manchester, Stewart and Vic face a hostile reception at a family run garage that owes £6,000 in professional fees(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul discovers that Jane's catfish is his old adversary Mannix Foster, but faces a counter-threat when he confronts him. Paige reveals a shocking truth after standing Mark up(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tori goes home, and learns that Leah is missing. After asking Scott to arrange a meeting with Victor and Des, Robbo spends quality time with Jasmine(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team fights to keep Amber alive, as an amnesic House undergoes a radical procedure to help him remember a vital symptom he saw before the crash. Wilson persuades his colleague to lower the patient's body temperature to give them more time to discover the cause of her illness, but that only postpones what seems to be her inevitable death. Hugh Laurie and Anne Dudek star, with guest Fred Durst of Limp Bizkit(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Wilson ends both his career at the hospital and his friendship with House in the aftermath of personal tragedy, while Thirteen struggles with her own medical problems. Drama, starring Robert Sean Leonard and Olivia Wilde(n)

programme.desc: Paul discovers that Jane's catfish is his old adversary Mannix Foster, but faces a counter-threat when he confronts him. Paige reveals a shocking truth after standing Mark up(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as the hospital siege escalates. After Robbo's interview with Ouroboros leader Des yields nothing, he suspects there is a mole inside the Feds(n)

programme.title: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: Residents at University Hospital in New Orleans help a 15-year-old who goes into labour prematurely and a woman who has been bleeding for weeks after giving birth(n)

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: Cherry Healey hosts the show in which experts transform people's looks and lives, including Gail, a farmer who has spent more time caring for her animals than herself. Cameras also follow dog walker Sarah, who has been hiding herself and her insecurities under layers of baggy clothes(n)

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life(n)

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Documentary following people with a compulsion to hoard. The first episode features a woman diagnosed with cancer whose home is full of rotten food and dead mice, a father whose relationship with his daughter has suffered as a result of his obsession, and a Huddersfield man whose clutter caught fire, burning his house to the ground(n)

programme.title: Angels & Demons (2009)
programme.desc: Academic adventurer Robert Langdon is called in by the Vatican to deal with a crisis. Pope Pius XVI has died suddenly and the four cardinals in line to be his successor have all been abducted by a mysterious sect that is threatening to murder them. As he searches for the kidnapped clerics, Langdon discovers the cult has an even more horrific plan in mind involving a stolen canister of anti-matter. Ron Howard takes the reins once again for the sequel to The Da Vinci Code, with Tom Hanks, Ewan McGregor, Ayelet Zurer Stellan Skarsgard and Pierfrancesco Favino(n)

programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary examining the reality of life inside British prisons, using footage illegally recorded by inmates plus interviews with former offenders and wardens(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: When Charlie realises that new neighbour Danielle shares a lot in common with Alan, he proceeds to set them up. The matchmaker soon becomes jealous though and plans to sabotage the relationship. Brooke Shields guest stars(n)

programme.title: 3rd Rock from the Sun
programme.desc: Dick quits the university on a matter of principle, in the mistaken belief that he will be welcomed back with open arms, while amnesia leaves Harry baffled to find he is living in a house full of aliens(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: When a magician suffers a suspected heart attack during a risky illusion, House believes he faked it because he could not complete the trick, and challenges Kutner to prove him wrong - or lose his job. Meanwhile, the medic sets his applicants a daunting challenge and Thirteen's secret is revealed. Hugh Laurie, Kal Penn and Olivia Wilde star(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic struggles to decide which of the remaining candidates to employ. To make his task easier, he challenges them to treat a punk rocker who was admitted coughing up blood, with whoever provides the correct diagnosis becoming part of the new team. Meanwhile, Wilson faces an unusual lawsuit when he reverses his original prognosis of a man's illness, incensing the patient. Hugh Laurie and Robert Sean Leonard star(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Three disputes between people whose houses border each other in Spain, including a couple whose dreams of a new life abroad were left in tatters after a campaign of vandalism and abuse, sparked by building a private terrace. Elsewhere, a woman who built an animal sanctuary discovers that local hunters use her land, but her decision to revoke their permission sparked an horrific turn of events(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland 12 hours after an elderly couple are reported missing, residents in a rural village react with shock at the thought of a killer in their midst. Police and forensic teams worked fast and quickly made an arrest, but soon another name was in the frame, although the search for this new suspect would lead detectives far and wide. One question remained, however. Where was the second body?(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. Steve and Phil have to evict a distraught young family from a former high street bank in west London, before paying a call on an elderly tailor in north London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aussie soap, charting the lives and loves of the good folk of Erinsborough(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as the hospital siege escalates. After Robbo's interview with Ouroboros leader Des yields nothing, he suspects there is a mole inside the Feds(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: When several people die suddenly five years after receiving transplants from the same organ donor, the doctor and his team race to save the two surviving recipients. House hires a private detective to investigate the dead donor, and decides to entertain himself by holding auditions for a new best friend to replace Wilson. Drama, starring Hugh Laurie and Lisa Edelstein(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctor becomes intrigued by an artist whose career is threatened by his distorted vision, which is causing him to paint strange portraits. House discovers he is taking part in three drug trials to pay the bills, leaving the medic to uncover which of the substances is causing adverse effects. Breckin Meyer guest stars(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aussie soap, charting the lives and loves of the good folk of Erinsborough(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac breaks cover to get help for a rapidly deteriorating Bella, but the gunmen refuse to let Alex treat her. Mason creates a diversion to let some hostages escape(n)

programme.title: Spray Tan Mums: Single and Proud
programme.desc: With her hands already full bringing up her three boys, vlogging queen Danielle has a strict no-man policy, but nevertheless agrees to undergo a spot of spiritual healing with reiki master Kev to see if the experience will change her mind against her 'no-man plan'. With the help of a personal trainer and 15-year-old daughter Elisia, Natalee goes all-out to lose some weight so she can get back into her skinny jeans, while working mum Jo receives a shock when a £900 energy bill lands out of the blue(n)

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 1 (2011)
programme.desc: Peaceful vampire Edward marries his human girlfriend Bella, who soon falls pregnant. However, the existence of this child has dangerous implications for them and the people around them, and a pack of werewolves is determined to prevent the birth by any means necessary. The first half of the two-part conclusion to the romantic fantasy series, with Kristen Stewart and Robert Pattinson(n)

Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Jason Segel and Lucy Punch(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A one-off edition of the documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Nick visits Stafford to meet seasoned CCTV operator and ex-police officer Barbara, who helps catch a drug user after spotting him on camera. Plus, control room operative Chris is on the lookout for regular shoplifters in Woking, while mild-mannered Jo foils a gang of thieves in Huntingdonshire(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man falls from a bridge in what appears to be a straightforward suicide, but lab results reveal he was shot in the chest before being thrown off. Hawkes dives into the Hudson River to search for the murder weapon, and discovers an antique that reveals the 'Compass killer' has returned and claimed his third victim. Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team uncover the lair of serial murderer the 'Compass Killer' while investigating how he escaped from the World's Fair site in Queens. Stella learns he is targeting people whom he imagines could have been responsible for his wife's death, and the case becomes a race against time to find out who will be the fourth victim. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: When the body of 22-year-old Nina Dickerson is discovered on the floor in her apartment by two young peeping toms with a spy cam, Jake concludes that it was suicide when he finds an empty bottle of hemlock in her bin. However, as several details do not make sense, Laura is not convinced and badgers Captain Santiani into taking the case further. Starring Debra Messing and Josh Lucas(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady look into the murder of Carl Mullaly, who had recently been profiled on HardFocus, a magazine programme that identifies sex offenders. The only witness is an eight-year-old girl and detectives soon make an arrest, but learn the tabloid talk show may have been more involved than it initially appeared(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The CEO of a military equipment contractor is murdered, leading Cassady and Green to initially suspect anti-war protesters. The victim's widow later receives a Purple Heart medal, linking the act to the killing of a soldier in Iraq, which prompts the detectives to track down the dead serviceman's former comrades. Guest starring Titus Welliver (The Good Wife), with Milena Govich(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy vows to find those responsible when a key witness to the killing of a drug dealer is shot dead. Suspicion falls on the accused's cousin, a local hoodlum with a number of charges to his name, and another associate who refuses to make a deal with the investigators. Sam Waterson, Elisabeth Rohm and Jerry Orbach star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A cross-dresser is suspected of killing and dismembering a cantankerous former boxer - but the team is unable to find vital body parts, making it impossible for the medical examiner to prove the case is murder. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant dies of ricin poisoning and the detectives' inquiries link him and his brother to a prostitution ring trafficking young women into New York. A police officer whose daughter was among the girls is the main suspect, but Green and Cassady face difficulties with the Russian consulate(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the abduction and murder of a child, following a lead to a suspected serial paedophile, who is found holding another boy captive. However, the youngster seems to be more than just an innocent victim. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is accused of murdering her husband's mistress. Although the crime is found to be premeditated, the defendant's lawyer claims his client's actions were prompted by post-traumatic stress syndrome arising from the September 11 terrorist attack. Starring Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A recently paroled prison gang member is shot dead, and suspicion falls on former crime associates - until his battle behind bars with a corrections officer comes to light. McCoy then learns the defence attorney will claim his client took action to ward off a threat by the con and his 'brotherhood'. Guest starring Candice Bergen(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A captain on board a yacht is shot dead, and a waiter is found with his throat cut. The crimes are thought to have been committed in waters that are known to be smuggling territory, and when it emerges the vessel belongs to Garcia, the head of a drugs cartel, the coastguard calls the NCIS team to investigate. However, when Pride begins his inquiries, he realises a parallel case run by the FBI could complicate matters, as could an encounter with an old friend - who is now engaged to Garcia(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: After a major Tal operative escapes CIA custody, Shepherd returns to Langley to help track the fugitive down. Shepherd and Keaton discover the CIA is withholding vital information(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when the wife of a popular writer is accused of spousal abuse after fighting with her stepdaughters. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Carisi's future brother-in-law accuses his female parole officer of rape, forcing the detective to investigate whether his sister's fiance is telling the truth or allowing his old habits to resurface. Drama, starring Peter Scanavino and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A disturbed young man with a vendetta against women seeks revenge for being snubbed and bullied in his past, which leaves Rollins in danger as she tries to stop an attack. Elsewhere, Benson tries to find the time to see her son in hospital(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two college students are accused of raping a classmate who appeared in a series of pornographic videos to pay for her education(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A woman who suffered a miscarriage of justice during an arson case goes on trial for murdering her abusive former cellmate, and the case could have embarrassing repercussions for Winters' wife, a retired police officer who was one of the detectives who helped place the accused behind bars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A professional surfer is found dead in his shop, and as Morales sets out to expose the killer, he discovered the victim had an illicit side-line in medicinal marijuana. Crime drama, starring Skeet Ulrich and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team responds to an emergency call from a luxury penthouse, and arrives to find a mummified corpse in the living room. Learning there could be further victims trapped in the apartment, Mac and Stella try to unravel a series of riddles in the booby-trapped 'death house'. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The murder of a former drug addict uncovers an insurance racket worth millions of dollars. Initially, a rock singer whose car was used in the killing is the prime suspect, until two femmes fatales come to the fore. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes, with Vanessa Minnillo and Kim Kardashian (who both starred in Disaster Movie) and Pat Monahan (from the band Train)(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The homicide detective investigates the murder of Zac Romero, the reclusive 22-year-old billionaire founder of the nanotech company Folkalize. There are an unusually high number of lacerations on the body and the killer appears to have been the invisible man. Comedy drama, starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An actor wearing blood-stained clothing is arrested for drink-driving, and makes his situation worse by embarking on a racist speech. Green and Cassady are left to uncover whether a murder has taken place, discovering that the executive producer of his former TV show has been found dead in Harlem - but realise the star may be covering for his son. Crime drama, guest starring Chevy Chase(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate the death of corporate attorney Charles Dillon, whose body was found in a hotel room, and discover the company he was working for was in the process of being indicted. Their inquiry leads them to the female CEO and her relationship with a prostitute. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor is murdered shortly before she is due to testify at the trial of a former SS Officer stationed at a concentration camp, forcing McCoy to consider who stood to gain the most from the old woman's death - the alleged war criminal, or a music producer promoting racist records(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A respected district attorney is found dead in Central Park - and as Briscoe and Green investigate, they discover he was actually living under an assumed identity, and had never graduated from law school. To complicate matters, further inquiries link his murder to that of a journalist 10 years previously. Guest starring Michael Bloomberg(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The deaths of two homeless men within a day of each other prompts Green and Cassady to investigate a possible connection between the cases. They discover one of the victims got into a fight with a fellow Iraq War veteran, and McCoy reveals the crime could be related to the deplorable conditions the perpetrator was subjected to at an army hospital. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy discovers two suicide victims were participating in clinical trials of an experimental antidepressant, prompting him to charge the drug company's CEO with second-degree murder. In court the defence argues all medical research carries an element of risk and the judge rules prosecution evidence inadmissible, leaving the outcome on a knife-edge. Sam Waterston and Dennis Farina star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green goes undercover to gather evidence on gun dealers who murdered two detectives during a firearms sting, and McCoy tries to prove a fellow attorney paid the killers to avenge the death of his stepson, who was shot dead in a police operation several years earlier. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride decides to act without the FBI's knowledge to deal with drug baron Garcia, and as he takes matters into his own hands, his NCIS comrades volunteer to help - without knowing the full consequences of their involvement. Sebastian goes undercover to bring down the cartel leader, while Patton must employ his old gambling tricks to set Pride's dangerous plan in motion(n)

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When Andy and Chloe discover a severely beaten man in a vacant unit, their investigation uncovers a criminal operation. Police drama set in Toronto, Canada, starring Missy Peregrym(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A female student claims to have been assaulted by four men, prompting the team to investigate the victim's story and bring the attackers to justice(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A high-school sex party sparks a vaccination debate when those involved contract the measles. Meanwhile, Noah suffers another health scare(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A former footballer is caught abusing his ex-girlfriend in leaked surveillance camera footage, and Fin and Benson investigate the couple's history. The pair - sportscaster AJ Martin and partner Paula - struggle to keep their family and relationship intact in the wake of the video's appearance(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU detectives team up with their counterparts in the Chicago Intelligence Unit to take down a child pornography ring. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Public works employee Luis Valdez is found stabbed to death in a ditch by the side of a road. He had recently visited the locations of several unsolved murders, so a theory is proposed that Valdez was on to the killer and was murdered to keep him quiet. To build a case, the team re-examines the evidence of the cold cases, using modern techniques, but this prompts the serial killer involved to come out of retirement. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A professional golfer is murdered, and a search of her phone's GPS and call history reveals she had been contacting someone on an anonymous 'burner' phone. The phone's location appears to correlate to big golf tournaments, except for one weekend when calls were made to Vegas when there was no such event taking place. This finding leads the detectives to uncover the shady dealings of a fellow sports star. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll, Alfred Molina and Skeet Ulrich(n)

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A discrepancy at the murder scene of an 18-year-old woman implicates assistant district attorney Craig Hansen in a different crime. Stella interrupts a bail hearing to arrest him, but her intervention results in a suspected killer being released back onto the streets. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A quarterback is found dead with traces of anaesthetic in her blood, prompting the detectives to set about discovering who could have wanted to kill her. A team-mate becomes the prime suspect, but further digging focuses attention on her problematic relationship with an ex-fiance, who reveals she had become obsessed with cosmetic procedures. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: Dan Hauser, Laura's former team captain, calls her out of the blue from his prison. Acting on his tip-off, she and Jake visit an old warehouse owned by gangster Thomas Mullens, aka the Irishman, where she finds the bodies of Sarah Price and Gary West, who disappeared after they stole $10million in unmarked currency. However, Laura has not told Santiani about the tip off and finds herself in hot water when her duplicity is discovered after Dan and Mullens escape from their maximum security prison. Laura is taken off the case, but ignores the ban and persuades her team to keep her informed of the manhunt's progress. Debra Messing stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man's death offers no immediate explanation, until the autopsy points Green and Cassady in the direction of illegally harvested donor bones, which the dead man had received in a transplant. However, McCoy and Rubirosa struggle to bring the case to prosecution when it becomes clear they can only get the necessary evidence by testing another transplant recipient(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The husband of a well-known actress is gunned down outside a shop while holding a baby the couple had recently adopted from Africa. The murder inquiry soon turns into an investigation about a child's death when the identity of the adopted infant comes under question. Guest starring Anna Chlumsky (My Girl) and Jennifer Beals (Lie to Me)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green attend the scene of a double homicide at an exclusive restaurant. It transpires that one of the victims was a respected Hollywood producer - and had made enemies in the criminal underworld after filming a movie about the Mafia. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bar-room brawl results in a baseball player being killed, leading Briscoe and Green to suspect a sporting grudge is behind the killing. However, a very different vendetta comes to light as the evidence points to a man recently exonerated after serving 20 years in prison for murder. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green embark on their first official case together, investigating the kidnapping of a mother and daughter which occurred during a city-wide blackout. When it appears the abductor knew about the power cut in advance, the possibility of the manipulation of energy is called into question(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant security guard is injured when a package explodes at a scientific research lab, prompting Green and Lupo to investigate a chemist's latest experiments. It transpires that research is being undertaken to establish whether it is possible to isolate the 'gay gene' in unborn foetuses. Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A famous novelist dies after undergoing plastic surgery, leading to the discovery that her surgeon made a crucial mistake by prescribing a drug that should not have been mixed with the antidepressants she was already taking. McCoy suggests the next of kin prosecute in a civil case, but Southerlyn disagrees and hunts for further evidence of malpractice(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The Governor of Connecticut's wife is murdered at a Republican Party function and the investigation leads police to uncover a gay love triangle involving her husband. An arrest is soon made, but a key witness is barred from testifying at the trial because he has entered into a civil partnership with the killer(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride travels to a deep-sea oil rig to investigate a murder, but his life is placed in peril when the team discovers a gas leak on-site is on the verge of causing a catastrophic explosion. With their boss trapped on board the facility, the agents work to save him while he continues to pursue the killer. Meanwhile, Gregorio begins her first day as an official member of the NCIS team(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Barba ask witnesses to risk their jobs when a news anchor makes a rape accusation against her boss on the air(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Police from Chicago arrive and team up with the squad to track down a suspect they had to release earlier when a crime in their city resembles a decade-old New York City case. Starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The daughter of a man convicted for rape and incest seeks to change the testimony she gave and bring about her father's release - but the judge refuses to reopen the case(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Best friends Perry Gilbert and Mia Harris sneak into the woods with Mia's young sister Zoe in tow. Their search for the mythical Glasgowman leads to a series of violent events, leaving Zoe gravely injured and the other girls missing. Detectives Rollins and Carisi work to locate the suspect, while Benson digs through the stories to distinguish fantasy from reality. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Peter Scanavino(n)

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Jenni Falconer helps two friends with a budget of £250,000 who are hoping to buy a property in Puglia, Italy(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Spitfire Women
programme.desc: The story of the 168 female pilots who served in Britain's Air Transport Auxiliary - an organisation responsible for delivering aircraft to the RAF on the front lines of battle during the Second World War. Despite having no radio or navigation equipment, ATA pilots were expected to fly any kind of aircraft to the destinations where they were most needed, often risking their lives in the process. The film also features interviews with the last surviving female veterans, who speak about the dangers they encountered in the skies and the discrimination they faced back home(n)
